proposed_hypotheses.text: The overall objective response rate in the cohort is non-zero and meaningful (greater than 5%).
Patients receiving treatment_7plus3 have a higher objective response rate than patients not receiving treatment_7plus3.

Patients receiving treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine have a different (likely lower) objective response rate than patients not receiving treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine, given that ven/aza is preferentially used in unfit patients.

analyses.result_summary: ORR with ven/aza = 0.1735 vs without = 0.1661 (diff=0.0074, OR=1.054, chi2 p=3.149e-02).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_midostaurin have a higher objective response rate than patients not receiving it (overall, unstratified).
Patients receiving treatment_gilteritinib have a higher objective response rate than patients not receiving it (overall, unstratified).
FLT3-ITD positive patients have a different ORR than FLT3-ITD negative patients (overall, unstratified).

analyses.result_summary: ORR with treatment_midostaurin=1: 0.1686; ORR with treatment_midostaurin=0: 0.1691; diff=-0.0005, OR=0.996, p=9.228e-01.
ORR with treatment_gilteritinib=1: 0.1630; ORR with treatment_gilteritinib=0: 0.1701; diff=-0.0071, OR=0.950, p=1.344e-01.
ORR with flt3_itd=1: 0.1719; ORR with flt3_itd=0: 0.1683; diff=0.0036, OR=1.026, p=4.019e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of treatment_midostaurin on objective_response is greater in flt3_itd-positive patients than in flt3_itd-negative patients (positive interaction).
The benefit of treatment_gilteritinib on objective_response is greater in flt3_itd-positive patients than in flt3_itd-negative patients (positive interaction).

analyses.result_summary: In FLT3-ITD+: ORR with midostaurin=0.1614, without=0.1737 (diff=-0.0123). In FLT3-ITD-: ORR with midostaurin=0.1703, without=0.1680 (diff=0.0023). Logit interaction beta=-0.105, p=2.185e-01.
In FLT3-ITD+: ORR with gilteritinib=0.1690, without=0.1724 (diff=-0.0034). In FLT3-ITD-: ORR with gilteritinib=0.1615, without=0.1695 (diff=-0.0080). Logit interaction beta=0.034, p=6.861e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_ivosidenib improves objective_response more in idh1_mutation-positive patients than in idh1_mutation-negative patients (positive interaction).
treatment_enasidenib improves objective_response more in idh2_mutation-positive patients than in idh2_mutation-negative patients (positive interaction).
treatment_ivosidenib does NOT improve objective_response in idh1_mutation-negative patients (no off-target benefit).

analyses.result_summary: In IDH1+: ORR with ivosidenib=0.1745, without=0.2255 (diff=-0.0510). In IDH1-: ORR with ivosidenib=0.1706, without=0.1645 (diff=0.0061). Interaction beta=-0.364, p=2.706e-02.
Within IDH1-neg: ORR with ivosidenib=0.1706 vs without=0.1645 (diff=0.0061, OR=1.045, p=3.507e-01).
In IDH2+: ORR with enasidenib=0.1441, without=0.1672 (diff=-0.0231). In IDH2-: ORR with enasidenib=0.1628, without=0.1700 (diff=-0.0072). Interaction beta=-0.124, p=4.477e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with tp53_mutation have a lower objective_response rate than tp53_mutation-negative patients.
Patients with complex_karyotype have a lower objective_response rate than complex_karyotype-negative patients.
Patients with npm1_mutation have a higher objective_response rate than npm1_mutation-negative patients.

analyses.result_summary: ORR with tp53_mutation=1: 0.1657; ORR with tp53_mutation=0: 0.1694; diff=-0.0037, OR=0.974, p=5.197e-01.
ORR with complex_karyotype=1: 0.1681; ORR with complex_karyotype=0: 0.1692; diff=-0.0012, OR=0.992, p=8.179e-01.
ORR with npm1_mutation=1: 0.1732; ORR with npm1_mutation=0: 0.1673; diff=0.0059, OR=1.043, p=1.092e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher age_years is associated with lower probability of objective_response (negative association).
Higher ecog_ps is associated with lower probability of objective_response (negative association).
Patients with secondary_aml have a lower objective_response rate than de novo (secondary_aml=0) patients.
Patients flagged unfit_for_intensive have a lower objective_response rate than fit (unfit_for_intensive=0) patients.

analyses.result_summary: Logit slope on age_years = 0.0004 per year (OR per yr=1.000), p=7.183e-01.
Logit slope on ecog_ps = -0.3837 per ECOG point (OR=0.681), p=1.842e-97.
ORR with secondary_aml=1: 0.1687; with secondary_aml=0: 0.1692; diff=-0.0005, OR=0.997, p=9.148e-01.
ORR with unfit_for_intensive=1: 0.1695; with unfit_for_intensive=0: 0.1687; diff=0.0007, OR=1.005, p=8.411e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher wbc_k_per_ul (presenting WBC) is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher blast_pct_marrow is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher ldh_u_l (LDH) is associated with lower objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: Logit slope on wbc_k_per_ul = -0.002156 (OR per unit=0.9978), p=1.881e-05. Median split: above-median ORR=0.1610, below-median ORR=0.1771.
Logit slope on blast_pct_marrow = -0.005667 (OR per unit=0.9943), p=1.156e-19. Median split: above-median ORR=0.1558, below-median ORR=0.1822.
Logit slope on ldh_u_l = -0.000138 (OR per unit=0.9999), p=3.507e-01. Median split: above-median ORR=0.1677, below-median ORR=0.1704.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with higher objective_response (positive association).
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher crp_mg_l (inflammation) is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher nlr (neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with lower objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: Logit slope on albumin_g_dl = 0.11512 (OR per unit=1.1220), p=1.359e-06.
Logit slope on weight_loss_pct_6mo = -0.04014 (OR per unit=0.9607), p=7.430e-35.
Logit slope on crp_mg_l = -0.00700 (OR per unit=0.9930), p=2.817e-06.
Logit slope on nlr = -0.00331 (OR per unit=0.9967), p=5.627e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine improves objective_response more in unfit_for_intensive=1 patients than in unfit_for_intensive=0 patients (positive interaction).
treatment_7plus3 improves objective_response more in unfit_for_intensive=0 patients than in unfit_for_intensive=1 patients (negative interaction with unfit).
Within unfit_for_intensive=1, treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine yields higher ORR than treatment_7plus3.

analyses.result_summary: Unfit: ORR with ven/aza=0.1792 vs without=0.1630 (diff=0.0162). Fit: ORR with ven/aza=0.1697 vs without=0.1681 (diff=0.0015). Interaction beta=0.104, p=3.618e-02.
Unfit: ORR with 7+3=0.1691 vs without=0.1698 (diff=-0.0007). Fit: ORR with 7+3=0.1709 vs without=0.1670 (diff=0.0040). Interaction beta=-0.033, p=5.025e-01.

analyses.code: Within unfit: ven/aza-only vs 7+3-only ORR comparison

proposed_hypotheses.text: Objective response rate differs across race_ethnicity categories (any difference, omnibus).
Black patients have a lower objective_response rate than white patients.
Hispanic patients have a different objective_response rate than non-Hispanic white patients.

analyses.result_summary: Hispanic ORR=0.1670; White ORR=0.1728; diff=-0.0059, p=2.259e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Objective response rate differs across insurance_type categories (omnibus).
Uninsured patients have a lower objective_response rate than privately insured patients.
Patients with rural_residence=1 have a different objective_response rate than urban (rural_residence=0) patients.
Higher education_years is associated with higher objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: Uninsured ORR=0.1662; Private ORR=0.1666; diff=-0.0004, p=9.905e-01.
Logit slope on education_years = 0.00039 (OR per yr=1.0004), p=9.215e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Female sex (sex_female=1) is associated with a different objective_response rate than male.
Patients with heart_failure have a lower objective_response rate than those without.
Patients with chronic_kidney_disease have a lower objective_response rate.
Patients with diabetes_mellitus have a different objective_response rate than non-diabetic patients.

analyses.result_summary: ORR with sex_female=1: 0.1709; with sex_female=0: 0.1675; diff=0.0033, OR=1.024, p=3.263e-01.
ORR with heart_failure=1: 0.1671; with heart_failure=0: 0.1693; diff=-0.0021, OR=0.985, p=7.176e-01.
ORR with chronic_kidney_disease=1: 0.1759; with chronic_kidney_disease=0: 0.1681; diff=0.0078, OR=1.056, p=1.327e-01.
ORR with diabetes_mellitus=1: 0.1721; with diabetes_mellitus=0: 0.1682; diff=0.0040, OR=1.029, p=3.325e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with higher objective_response.
Higher platelets_k_ul (presenting platelet count) is associated with higher objective_response.
Higher anc_k_ul (absolute neutrophil count) is associated with higher objective_response.
Higher total_bilirubin_mg_dl is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher creatinine_mg_dl is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher inr (coagulopathy) is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher fatigue_grade is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher pain_nrs is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher dyspnea_grade is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with lower objective_response.
psa_ng_ml has no significant association with objective_response in this AML cohort (null sanity check).
ca_125_u_ml has no significant association with objective_response in this AML cohort (null sanity check).
cea_ng_ml has no significant association with objective_response in this AML cohort (null sanity check).
her2_amplification has no association with objective_response in this AML cohort (null sanity).
braf_v600e has no association with objective_response in this AML cohort (null sanity).
msi_high has no association with objective_response in this AML cohort (null sanity).
ros1_fusion has no association with objective_response in this AML cohort (null sanity).
snp_rs1045642 (ABCB1, drug efflux) has an association with objective_response.
snp_rs1801133 (MTHFR C677T) has an association with objective_response.
snp_rs429358 (APOE e4) has an association with objective_response (likely null in AML).
snp_rs1800629 (TNF-alpha promoter) has an association with objective_response.
TP53 mutation reduces benefit of treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine on objective_response (negative interaction tp53_mutation:treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine).
TP53 mutation reduces benefit of treatment_7plus3 on objective_response (negative interaction).
complex_karyotype reduces benefit of treatment_7plus3 on objective_response (negative interaction).

analyses.result_summary: In tp53_mutation+: ORR with treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=0.1636, without=0.1672, diff=-0.0036. In tp53_mutation-: diff=0.0086. Interaction beta=-0.087, p=2.849e-01.
In tp53_mutation+: ORR with treatment_7plus3=0.1638, without=0.1672, diff=-0.0034. In tp53_mutation-: diff=0.0027. Interaction beta=-0.044, p=5.880e-01.
In complex_karyotype+: ORR with treatment_7plus3=0.1555, without=0.1787, diff=-0.0232. In complex_karyotype-: diff=0.0066. Interaction beta=-0.213, p=1.644e-03.

proposed_hypotheses.text: NPM1 mutation enhances benefit of treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine on objective_response (positive interaction).
FLT3-TKD enhances benefit of treatment_gilteritinib (positive interaction flt3_tkd:treatment_gilteritinib).
Either FLT3-ITD or FLT3-TKD positivity enhances benefit of treatment_midostaurin (positive interaction).

analyses.code: logit objective_response ~ flt3_any * treatment_midostaurin (flt3_any=ITD or TKD)
analyses.result_summary: FLT3-any+: midostaurin ORR=0.1622 vs without=0.1712 (diff=-0.0090). FLT3-any-: diff=0.0024. Interaction beta=-0.082, p=2.915e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for age, ECOG, secondary_aml, unfit_for_intensive, complex_karyotype, tp53_mutation, npm1_mutation, and major treatments, age_years remains independently associated with lower objective_response.
After multivariable adjustment, ecog_ps remains independently associated with lower objective_response.
After multivariable adjustment, tp53_mutation remains independently associated with lower objective_response.
After multivariable adjustment, npm1_mutation remains independently associated with higher objective_response.
After multivariable adjustment, treatment_7plus3 retains an independent positive association with objective_response.
After multivariable adjustment, treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine retains an independent positive association with objective_response.
After multivariable adjustment including biomarker matching, treatment_ivosidenib has only a small overall main-effect signal (because its benefit is restricted to IDH1-mutated patients).
Higher albumin_g_dl remains associated with higher objective_response in the multivariable model.
After adjustment for clinical and treatment features, race_ethnicity (black vs white) remains associated with objective_response, indicating a residual disparity.
After adjustment for clinical and treatment features, insurance_type (uninsured vs private) remains associated with objective_response.

analyses.code: multivariable logit on black vs white subset
analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted: Black ORR=0.1574, White ORR=0.1728, diff=-0.0154. Adjusted slope on black=-0.1145 (aOR=0.8918), p=3.278e-03.

analyses.code: multivariable logit on uninsured vs private subset
analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted: Uninsured ORR=0.1662, Private ORR=0.1666, diff=-0.0004. Adjusted slope on uninsured=-0.0019 (aOR=0.9981), p=9.764e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: bmi has no significant association with objective_response in this AML cohort.
smoking_pack_years has no significant association with objective_response in this AML cohort.
systolic_bp_mmhg has no significant association with objective_response in this AML cohort.
spo2_pct (oxygen saturation) is associated with objective_response (lower SpO2 → lower ORR).
An indicator for biomarker-matched targeted therapy (FLT3-ITD with midostaurin or gilteritinib; IDH1 with ivosidenib; IDH2 with enasidenib) is positively associated with objective_response.
The aggregate adverse-cytogenetics/molecular signature (tp53_mutation OR complex_karyotype) is independently associated with lower objective_response after multivariable adjustment.
Among IDH1-mutated patients only, treatment_ivosidenib increases objective_response relative to no ivosidenib.
Among IDH2-mutated patients only, treatment_enasidenib increases objective_response relative to no enasidenib.

analyses.code: multivariable logit; adverse_cyto_mol = tp53_mutation OR complex_karyotype

analyses.result_summary: Within IDH1+ (n=3624): ivosidenib ORR=0.1745, no-ivosidenib ORR=0.2255, diff=-0.0510, OR=0.726, p=5.013e-02.
Within IDH2+ (n=4679): enasidenib ORR=0.1441, no-enasidenib ORR=0.1672, diff=-0.0231, OR=0.839, p=2.936e-01.
